hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in */evmc/*|*/third_party/*) echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Do not modify evmc/ or third_party/ unless explicitly required"}'; exit 0;; esac

d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh"
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.cpp|*.h|*.cc|*.cxx) clang-format -style=file -i "$FILE";; esac
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh"

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Before compacting, preserve: 1) Full change doc path and its current status. 2) All plan steps and which are completed/in-progress. 3) Current worktree path and branch name. 4) Any test results or benchmark numbers from this session. 5) Key decisions made during brainstorming."}}'
